hero.subheadline: Expert-guided trekking, desert tours, and cultural adventures — deep into the Atlas, the Sahara, and beyond.

categories.title: Explore by Category
categories.subtitle: From high mountain treks to cultural medina walks — find your perfect Morocco experience.

featuredTours.title: Featured Adventures
featuredTours.subtitle: Hand-picked tours that consistently earn 5-star reviews from travellers worldwide.

whyUs.title: Built for Serious Adventurers
whyUs.subtitle: We're not a booking platform. We're a team of passionate local guides who live and breathe Morocco's wild landscapes.

certified.title: Certified Mountain Guides
certified.desc: All our guides hold official Moroccan Ministry of Tourism certifications and have years of field experience.

smallGroups.title: Private & Custom Groups
smallGroups.desc: Private departures and custom group sizes available. Better safety, deeper experiences, and fully personalised attention.

eco.title: Leave No Trace
eco.desc: We partner with local communities and follow strict eco principles to protect Morocco's landscapes for future generations.

responsive.title: Fast, Human Support
responsive.desc: WhatsApp replies within 48 hours — usually much faster. Email may take a little longer. Real people, always reachable.

ourStory.title: Born in the Atlas Mountains
ourStory.body1: Marrakech Eco Tours was founded by a group of Berber guides who grew up trekking the High Atlas. We believe that the best way to experience Morocco is with people who call it home.
ourStory.body2: Every route we run is one we know intimately — the hidden valleys, the Berber villages that don't appear on maps, the desert camps where the silence is absolute. We share these places with the world while working to protect them.
ourStory.teamSubtitle: Born in the mountains, trained in the field, passionate about Morocco.

testimonials.title: Real Stories, Real Adventures
testimonials.subtitle: Over 1,000 adventurers have trusted us with their Morocco experience.

gallery.title: Morocco Through Our Lens
gallery.subtitle: Captured by our guides during real tours.

cta.title: Plan Your Perfect Morocco Adventure
cta.subtitle: Browse all {tourCount} tours from Marrakech and Agadir — or tell us your dream and we'll build the journey around you.

tours.customBannerTitle: Travelling with a large group, or want a completely custom itinerary?
tours.customBannerDesc: We build bespoke plans for private groups of any size — from 2 to 200. Tell us your dates, interests, and budget.
